Schedule & Playoffs.setting: Winning Percentage → Head to Head Record → Total Points → Division Record → Points Against (Schedule Difficulty).
Ties for division winner are resolved using standings tiebreakers.
Playoff ties go to the team with more points from Reserves.

Commish Message.content: Welcome to Sigma Beta Tau Fantasy Football! The league's commissioner can use this space to post messages to league members.

Constitution.content:
DRAFT
• Draft order determined by Playoff and Loser Bowl results
• Divisions randomly determined each year at draft
• Keepers: From 4th Round on, every player drafted the previous year is eligible
• Rule changes voted on at draft each year

STACKED BONUS
• 3-point stacked bonus: QB throwing TD to same-team receiver, TE, or RB

FEES & PAYOUTS
• Entry Fee: $500/team
• 1st Place: 70%   |   2nd Place: 20%   |   3rd Place: 10%
• Division Winners: $100 each
• Most Points (season): $100
• Best Record: $100

ROSTER
• IR slot: Removed

PLAYOFFS
• 8-Team Playoff — Weeks 15–17
• Top 3 per division seeded 1–3; remaining spots filled by best record
• Reseeded each round (highest seed vs. lowest seed)

LOSER BOWL
• 4 non-playoff teams compete to determine draft picks 1–6

2026 RULE
• Team with least total points (including playoffs) pays for trophy engraving & shipping
